summary: Iteration 136 - All 17 requested features tested successfully. Personal Mode sidebar correctly shows INVESTMENTS with only 'All Investments', PLANNING with Retirement/Goals & Scenarios/Rebalancing/Research Centre, TOOLS with Tax Centre/Loan Calculator (no Monte Carlo, no SMSF). Goals & Scenarios page has 2 tabs (Goals & Scenarios + Monte Carlo). All Investments page has 9 tabs including SMSF. Advisor Command Center has 3 tabs (Dashboard, Daily Briefing, Decision Centre). Client context shows 5 tabs and correct sidebar structure. All 4 redirect routes work correctly.

issues: Compliance Modal appears on page load blocking interactions - user must dismiss it before interacting. Known from previous iterations.
Recharts console warnings about width/height -1 on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles

context_for_next_testing_agent: All sidebar consolidation features working correctly. Personal Mode: INVESTMENTS has only 'All Investments', PLANNING has Retirement/Goals & Scenarios/Rebalancing/Research Centre, TOOLS has Tax Centre/Loan Calculator. Goals & Scenarios at /scenario-modelling has 2 tabs. All Investments at /investments has 9 tabs. Advisor Command Center at /advisor-command-center has 3 tabs. Client context at /dashboard (with selected_client) shows 5 tabs. All redirect routes work.
